channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

Looks like Sony will launch a cheaper OLED TV soon — the ‘Bravia 6’ has been spotted on Sony’s website, and it looks like it’ll actually beat the Bravia 8 II in two key areas: it has the extra sizes people have been asking for; and a full suite of HDMI 2.1 ports - TechRadar
